title: centaurea aetolica
intro: Centaurea aetolica, also known as mountain centaury, is a perennial plant species in the family Asteraceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its diuretic and expectorant properties, and is also known to possess antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Centaurea aetolica include alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as supporting kidney function and reducing inflammation. In herbal preparations, Centaurea aetolica can be consumed as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
